nodes.name: Shotstack – Start Render
nodes.notes:
Free sandbox key from shotstack.io — 200 renders/month.
Replace YOUR_SHOTSTACK_SANDBOX_KEY.
Returns a render ID. Next node polls until done.

nodes.name: Wait 30s for Render
nodes.notes: Shotstack typically takes 20-60s to render. Increase to 60s for longer videos.

nodes.name: Shotstack – Get Render URL
nodes.notes:
Polls for the final MP4 URL.
Response: response.url contains the download link when status is 'done'.

nodes.name: Voice RSS
nodes.notes:
No API key needed. Returns MP3 binary.
Voice options: Brian, Amy, Emma, Geraint, Russell, Nicole, Joey, Justin, Matthew
Max 500 chars — script is trimmed automatically.
Output is binary data in $binary.data

nodes.name: Pexels
nodes.notes:
Free API key from pixabay.com/api/docs
Replace YOUR_PIXABAY_KEY with your actual key.
Returns vertical video URLs.

parameters.text:
=You are a YouTube Shorts scriptwriter for Zyntelliq, a dark futuristic AI tech channel.

Write a punchy 45-second voiceover script (max 120 words) about:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Summary: {{ $json.summary }}

Rules:
- Hook in the first 3 words
- No filler words
- No stage directions, no parentheses, no visual cues
- Plain spoken words only
- End with exactly: Follow Zyntelliq for more

parameters.content:
🤖 AUTO AI NEWS YOUTUBE SHORTS PIPELINE

This workflow runs daily and fully automates a YouTube Shorts channel.

WHAT IT DOES:
1. Fetches the latest AI news headline from RSS
2. Generates a 45-second voiceover script using Groq (Llama 3)
3. Converts the script to speech via VoiceRSS
4. Finds a matching portrait video on Pexels
5. Renders the final 9:16 MP4 using Shotstack (cloud-based)
6. Downloads the rendered video
7. Uploads it directly to YouTube

⚠️ BEFORE YOU START — set your API keys in the ⚙️ Configure Here node.

REQUIRED KEYS:
- Groq API key (free) → console.groq.com
- VoiceRSS API key (free) → voicerss.org
- Pexels API key (free) → pexels.com/api
- Shotstack API key (free sandbox) → shotstack.io
- YouTube OAuth2 credentials → Google Cloud Console

⚙️ SET YOUR API KEYS HERE

Replace these 4 values before activating:
- YOUR_GROQ_API_KEY
- YOUR_VOICERSS_API_KEY
- YOUR_PEXELS_API_KEY
- YOUR_SHOTSTACK_API_KEY

Also connect your YouTube account in the Upload node credentials.

✍️ SCRIPT GENERATION

Uses Groq (Llama 3) to write a 45-second spoken voiceover.
Rules enforced in the prompt:
- Hook in the first 3 words
- No stage directions or visual cues
- Plain spoken words only
- Max 120 words

💡 Edit the prompt to match your channel name and tone.

🎙️ TEXT-TO-SPEECH

Converts the script to MP3 using VoiceRSS (free tier).
Script is auto-trimmed to 500 characters.

Available voices: Linda, Amy, Emma, Brian, Joey, Matthew, Geraint, Russell, Nicole, Justin

Change the &v= parameter to switch voices.
Get your free key at: voicerss.org

🎬 STOCK VIDEO SEARCH

Searches Pexels for portrait-orientation videos matching the news keyword.
Automatically picks 1080x1920 resolution where available.

💡 The keyword is auto-extracted from the headline (first 2 words).
You can override it in the Parse Script & Keyword node.

Get your free API key at: pexels.com/api

🎞️ CLOUD VIDEO RENDERING

Shotstack combines the stock video + TTS audio into a 9:16 MP4 in the cloud.
No FFmpeg. No local processing. Fully serverless.

Free sandbox = 200 renders/month → shotstack.io
The workflow waits 30 seconds then polls for the finished URL.

💡 Increase the Wait node to 60s if your videos are longer or rendering times out.

📤 YOUTUBE UPLOAD

Uploads the final MP4 directly to your YouTube channel.

Default settings:
- Category: Science & Technology (ID 28)
- Privacy: public
- Region: IN

💡 Change privacyStatus to "private" if you want to review before publishing.
Connect your YouTube account via Google OAuth2 credentials.
